Source   Edit  

Intelligence Corruption

Centralized module for applying disinformation corruption to intelligence reports Per espionage PlantDisinformation action - corrupts intel with 20-40% variance

Corruption DetectionInteger CorruptionFleet Intelligence CorruptionColony Intelligence CorruptionStarbase Intelligence CorruptionSystem Intelligence CorruptionScout Encounter Report Corruption

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../espionage/types, ../diplomacy/types, ../config/diplomacy_config, types

Procs

proc corruptColonyIntel(colony: intel_types.ColonyIntelReport; magnitude: float;
                        rng: var Rand): intel_types.ColonyIntelReport {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Corrupt colony intelligence data Source   Edit   
proc corruptFleetIntel(fleet: intel_types.FleetIntel; magnitude: float;
                       rng: var Rand): intel_types.FleetIntel {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Corrupt fleet intelligence data Source   Edit   
proc corruptInt(value: int; magnitude: float; rng: var Rand): int {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Corrupt an integer value by +/- magnitude percentage magnitude: 0.3 = +/- 30% variance Example: corruptInt(100, 0.3, rng) -> 70-130 Source   Edit

    int] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Corrupt an optional integer value Source   Edit

                        rng: var Rand): intel_types.SystemIntelReport {.

proc hasDishonoredCorruption(dishonoredStatus: dip_types.DishonoredStatus): Option[
    float] {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if a house is dishonored (causing intel corruption) Dishonored houses have disorganized/demoralized forces → bad intelligence Returns corruption magnitude if dishonored (duration from config) Source   Edit   
proc hasIntelCorruption(effects: seq[esp_types.OngoingEffect];
                        targetHouse: HouseId): Option[OngoingEffect] {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if a house has active intelligence corruption Returns the corruption effect if active Source   Edit
